response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct cloud platform AI system design, vector databases, or RAG architectures — key requirements for this role. Her background is broad but scattered across domains, with minimal emphasis on enterprise-grade GenAI deployment.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and teams
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing via workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or cloud-based AI systems
Missing direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks clear enterprise client-facing AI delivery history

key_factors.factor: Lack of GenAI/Cloud AI Production Track Record
